SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

umm.digiquilt.savehandler
Class SaveHandler

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.savehandler.SaveHandler

public class SaveHandler
extends Object

A SaveHandler that saves both locally and to the current server, using the given login name.

Version:
$Revision: 1.1 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-07-28 21:59:12 $

Field Summary
static String CHALLENGE_FILE_LOCATION
          The file on the server containing all the challenges, in xml format.
static String DEFAULT_CHALLENGE_FILE_TEXT
          The default text the challenges file needs to have
static String NAME_FILE_LOCATION
          The file on the server which contains the possible login names, one per line.
static String PATCH_EXT
          The file extension for DigiQuilt patch files, including the dot.
static String PATCH_IMAGE_EXT
          The file extension for DigiQuilt patch image files, including the dot.
static String QUILT_EXT
          The file extension for DigiQuilt files, including the dot.
 
Constructor Summary
SaveHandler(QuiltZeroconf qz, File quiltDirectory, String serverName)
          Create a new SaveHandler.
 
Method Summary
 void addChallenge(Challenge challengeToAdd)
          Add a challenge to the challenge file, and then synchronize to the server to try to send it to others.
 void addSyncListener(SyncListener listener)
          Add a listener to be notified when a synchronize() happens.
 void autosave(SaveXML xml)
          Perform an autosave of the given SaveXML.
 File getLocalSaveDirectory()

 QuiltZeroconf getQz()
           
 File getSaveDirectory()
           
 String getStudentName()
           
 void removeSyncListener(SyncListener listener)
          Remove the specified listener from the list.
 boolean save(SaveXML xml, BufferedImage icon, String blockName)
          Attempt to save the given SaveXML to the appropriate place or places.
 void setStudentName(String name)
           
 void synchronize()
          Download any files from the server that we don't have locally, and then upload anything saved while offline to the server.

clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

Constant Field Values
Constructor Detail

SaveHandler

public SaveHandler(QuiltZeroconf qz,
                   File quiltDirectory,
                   String serverName)
Create a new SaveHandler. When told to save, this will check both locally and remotely for name conflicts, and if there are none, save to both of them.

Parameters:
qz - A QuiltZeroconf to use to get connections
quiltDirectory - The overall directory for DQ classes
serverName - The name of the server to use.
Method Detail

setStudentName

public void setStudentName(String name)
Parameters:
name - The name of the current student, which will be used when saving files to identify who created them.

getStudentName

public String getStudentName()
Returns:
the name of the student

getSaveDirectory

public File getSaveDirectory()
Returns:
the directory where files will be saved.

addSyncListener

public void addSyncListener(SyncListener listener)
Add a listener to be notified when a synchronize() happens.

Parameters:
listener - The listener.

removeSyncListener

public void removeSyncListener(SyncListener listener)
Remove the specified listener from the list.

Parameters:
listener -

save

public boolean save(SaveXML xml,
                    BufferedImage icon,
                    String blockName)
             throws IOException
Attempt to save the given SaveXML to the appropriate place or places.

Parameters:
xml -
icon -
blockName -
Returns:
true if the save was successful, false if the given block name was already taken.
Throws:
IOException - if an I/O error occurs

autosave

public void autosave(SaveXML xml)
Perform an autosave of the given SaveXML. This will be saved to the server but is not public to clients.

Parameters:
xml -

getNames

public List<String> getNames()
                      throws IOException
Returns:
a list of possible names for this server.
Throws:
IOException

synchronize

public void synchronize()
                 throws IOException
Download any files from the server that we don't have locally, and then upload anything saved while offline to the server.

Throws:
IOException

addChallenge

public void addChallenge(Challenge challengeToAdd)
                  throws SAXException,
                         IOException
Add a challenge to the challenge file, and then synchronize to the server to try to send it to others.

challengeToAdd -

IOException
SAXException
